raw_consumer_statement: I have a XXXX XXXX Credit Card thru Citibank. When I logged into my account to pay my XXXX statement, I noticed charges for {$1000.00} and {$560.00} that I did not recognize. I contacted citibank customer service and disputed these charges. I also asked for them not to send me a new card as this was the second time I had issues with unrecognized charges. Halfway thru XXXX I got an email about having a balance on a new XXXX XXXX XXXX. I hadn't even received or activated a new card yet. I checked my account an noticed XXXX charges for {$660.00} and {$110.00}. I called and disputed these charges and again asked them not to send me a new card. Today, XX/XX/2024, I received a letter to my account stating that my dispute was declined, and they have also issued me a new card again.
